idea-plugin.name: DanteCode
idea-plugin.description:
DanteCode — AI Coding Agent for JetBrains

Open-source, model-agnostic AI coding assistant with runtime-verified code quality powered by the DanteForge verification pipeline.

Features

  • Chat Panel — Interactive AI chat right inside your IDE (JCEF rich UI with Swing fallback)
  • Inline Completions — Context-aware code completions with debounced, non-blocking requests
  • DanteForge Verification — One-click quality gate checks on any file
  • Multi-Model Support — Works with Claude, GPT, Grok, Gemini, and local models
  • Stdio Bridge — Reliable connection to the DanteCode CLI with auto-reconnect

Getting Started

  1. Install the DanteCode CLI: npm install -g @dantecode/cli
  2. Open the DanteCode panel from the right sidebar or Tools menu
  3. Start chatting or let inline completions assist your coding
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0-beta.1

  • Stdio bridge: lazy init, auto-reconnect with exponential backoff (3 retries), 30s request timeout
  • Chat panel: JCEF (Chromium) rich UI with Swing fallback for older IDEs
  • Loading indicator while connecting to CLI
  • Error state with install instructions when CLI is not found
  • Inline completions: 300ms debounce, cancel-on-type, non-blocking with timeout
  • Process death notification via IDE balloon
  • Stderr from CLI process routed to IntelliJ log
  • Compatibility: IntelliJ 2024.1 through 2025.1

action.description: Run DanteForge verification on current file
